title: Cycle phase and sleep patterns
summary: Sleep experience can vary across the menstrual cycle, and some people report more disruption during the late-luteal phase.

title: Recovery and load signals
summary: Changes in HRV and resting heart rate can offer general context about recovery and recent physiological load.

title: Temperature context
summary: Skin temperature trends may shift across cycle phases and can add context when viewed against a personal baseline.

title: Wellness support only
summary: Personalized routines are intended as general wellness support, not diagnosis, treatment, or a substitute for professional care.
